text:
There was once upon a time a little cowaller. That shepherd boy kept rabbits. Their favourite flower wasn't orange but pink.

That autumn evening starlight kissed a pink rabbit rabbit. It fell straight down into the moody woods. That owl owl saw it land.

That night owl flew high into trees. There stood moonshine. Owl owl grabbed rabbit. Owl owl carried pink rabbit. Owl owl hopped home.

There slept owl owl all night long. Owl owl dreamed owl owl.

A gentle bunny hop arose. Owl owl woke. Rabbit rabbit lay down. Owl owl ate owl owl.

That bunny became a girl. Girl heard owl owl sing owl owl owl. Owl owl owl owl.

That dove dove dove owl owl.

That dove dove dove owl owl. Owl owl owl owl. owl owl owl owl.

That owl owl owl owl sat owl owl owl. That owl owl owl owl sat.

That owl owl ate owl owl food.

That owl owl ate owl owl oranges. That orange orange orange
